description_long: This is a rectangular cardboard box of PG Tips tea, featuring a predominantly green and white color scheme with red accents. The top of the box displays the PG Tips logo and product information, while the front panel highlights the brand name and the phrase 'The Original Smooth, Balanced & Full-Bodied.' The sides of the box include additional branding, slogans such as 'Togetherness Starts With Tea,' and illustrations of tea cups. The back panel provides a detailed description of the tea's taste and origin, along with a leaf graphic and product details. The box appears to be sealed and is designed to hold tea bags, making it suitable for storage or transport. The surface is matte and likely made of printed, coated cardboard, giving it a sturdy yet lightweight feel.
description: A rectangular, green and white PG Tips tea box with bold branding, slogans, and product details printed on all sides. The box is made of sturdy cardboard and is designed for storing tea bags.
description_view_0: Front view showing the PG Tips logo, 'The Original' slogan, and a clean green and white design.
description_view_1: Side view with the slogan 'Togetherness Starts With Tea' and partial product information, plus a visible seam.
description_view_2: Back view featuring a detailed product description, a leaf graphic, and additional text about the tea's taste.
description_view_3: Opposite side view with the slogan 'Tastes Good, Does Good' and more product details, including a cup illustration.
